meta.title: Casa Schuck | Boutique Hotel in San Miguel de Allende
meta.description: A colonial sanctuary reimagined. Nine uniquely appointed rooms in the heart of San Miguel de Allende. Book direct for the best rate — breakfast included.

hero.headline: Find Your Center
hero.subheadline: All of San Miguel at your door

story.headline: A Home With Many Lives
story.intro: Every wall at Casa Schuck holds a chapter. From its origins as a colonial estate to its rebirth as San Miguel's most intimate boutique hotel, this home has sheltered artists, visionaries, and seekers for over 150 years.

eras.title: The Beginning
eras.body: Built in 1871, the house at Garita 3 began its life as a colonial residence in the heart of San Miguel de Allende. Thick cantera stone walls, vaulted ceilings, and a central courtyard — built for the generations who would inhabit it.

eras.title: The Schuck Era
eras.body: A century later, the Schuck family brought new energy to the property. Under their stewardship, the home became a gathering place for writers, painters, and intellectuals drawn to San Miguel's growing creative scene.

eras.title: An Artist Colony Blooms
eras.body: Through the 1970s, San Miguel de Allende transformed into an international artist colony. Casa Schuck was at its center — hosting exhibits, salon evenings, and the kind of conversations that only happen when creative souls share a courtyard.

eras.title: San Miguel's First Luxury B&B
eras.body: In 1978, Casa Schuck became one of the first luxury bed & breakfasts in San Miguel de Allende — pioneering a new kind of hospitality that was equal parts home, gallery, and sanctuary.

eras.title: A Living Heritage
eras.body: Today, Casa Schuck continues to evolve while honoring every chapter that came before. Nine rooms, each with its own personality. Original art on the walls. A courtyard that still gathers the creative, the curious, and those who simply need a place to exhale.

story.pullQuote: We didn't build a hotel. We opened our home.

breakfastCallout.headline: Breakfast Is Always Included
breakfastCallout.description: Begin each day with a feast that honors both Mexican heritage and international comfort. From authentic Chilaquiles and Huevos Rancheros to perfectly prepared classics — every plate is crafted with care in our colonial courtyard kitchen.
breakfastCallout.mexicanItems: Chilaquiles Verdes & Rojos, Huevos Rancheros, Fresh Fruit with Chili-Lime, Cafe de Olla
breakfastCallout.classicItems: Eggs Benedict, French Toast, Fresh-Baked Pastries, Organic Coffee & Fresh Juices
breakfastCallout.note: Served daily in the Courtyard. Dietary accommodations happily arranged.

rooms.headline: Nine Rooms. Nine Stories.
rooms.description: Each room at Casa Schuck has its own name, its own character, its own way of welcoming you. Colonial architecture, original art, and quiet modern comforts — woven together with intention.

weddings.headline: Say Yes in San Miguel
weddings.description: Imagine your ceremony in a centuries-old courtyard, beneath the jacaranda, with the sound of a colonial fountain as your music. Your reception on the rooftop, under a sky full of stars, with the Parroquia lit up in the distance.

pillars.title: Your Estate. Our Expertise.
pillars.body: We handle the gravity so you can enjoy the grace. You aren't just booking a venue; you are securing a private team dedicated to a single timeline: yours.
pillars.alt: Intimate courtyard ceremony with floral arch at a colonial venue

pillars.title: The Center of Your Celebration.
pillars.body: The logistical hub for your inner circle. We coordinate the movement between the Parroquia and the courtyard so your 60 guests experience zero friction.
pillars.alt: Wedding callejoneada through the colorful streets of San Miguel de Allende

pillars.title: Effortless Heritage.
pillars.body: Centuries of history, zero friction. We are the Planner's Best Ally, providing the infrastructure for seamless coordination.
pillars.alt: Couple with the Parroquia and vintage car on cobblestone streets

testimonials.quote: From the moment we walked into the courtyard, we knew this was where we'd say 'I do.' The team handled everything — the callejoneada through the cobblestone streets was pure magic. Our 45 guests still talk about the rooftop reception under the stars.

We wanted something intimate, not a production. Casa Schuck gave us exactly that — a wedding that felt like a celebration among family, in a home that already felt like ours. The coordination was flawless.

Our wedding planner said Casa Schuck was the easiest venue she'd ever worked with. The property is stunning, but what really sets it apart is the team — they anticipated every need before we even asked.

vendors.description: 3 vetted local photographers who know every angle of the property and San Miguel's most iconic backdrops.
Partnerships with San Miguel's top 2 floral ateliers for everything from bouquets to full courtyard installations.
Mariachi, jazz trio, DJ, and traditional callejoneada musicians — curated for every moment of your celebration.
In-house kitchen plus a network of 4 private chefs specializing in Mexican, international, and fusion cuisine.
Fleet of vintage cars for the couple, guest shuttles, and airport transfers coordinated door-to-door.

weddings.inquiryNote: Contact us via WhatsApp or email to begin planning your celebration.
weddings.specialistBody: Reach out to our Casa Schuck wedding specialist to explore all options, from private buyouts to custom logistics bundles.

services.headline: Curated Moments, Crafted For You
services.description: From the restorative to the adventurous — our concierge team designs experiences that transform your stay into a personal journey through San Miguel.
services.massageDescription: Unwind without leaving the sanctuary. Professional massage therapists come to you — in your room or in the courtyard, your choice.
services.massagePricing: 60 min: $80 USD | 90 min: $110 USD | 120 min: $140 USD
services.massageNote: Arranged through concierge. 24-hour advance booking recommended.
services.honorBarDescription: Help yourself to craft mezcal, local wines, and artisan spirits on the honor system. A curated selection that celebrates the best of Mexico's distilling traditions.
services.wineRackDescription: A rotating selection of Mexican wines hand-picked by our team. Ask us for pairing recommendations.
services.toursDescription: Discover San Miguel's hidden ateliers, rooftop mezcal bars, and centuries-old churches with our local expert guides. Walking, culinary, and art-focused itineraries available.
services.dayTripsDescription: Hot springs at La Gruta, the ancient ruins of Canada de la Virgen, wine country in Dolores Hidalgo — unforgettable journeys just beyond the city gates.
services.diningDescription: Secured tables at San Miguel's most coveted dining rooms. From rooftop fine dining to intimate mezcalerias — we handle the details.

meta.title: Services | Casa Schuck
meta.description: On-property services at Casa Schuck boutique hotel in San Miguel de Allende. Gastronomy, wellness, spa, tours, and curated excursions — all on your terms.

servicesPage.headline: Everything You Need, Nothing You Don't
servicesPage.description: Our concierge team designs each day around your preferences. From sunrise yoga to midnight mezcal — every service at Casa Schuck is available on your terms.

gastronomy.headline: The Art of the Table
gastronomy.description: Every meal at Casa Schuck is a celebration of Mexico's culinary heritage. From the included courtyard breakfast to private chef dinners under the stars, we believe food is the thread that weaves a stay into a story.

offerings.name: Included Breakfast
offerings.description: Begin each day in the courtyard with a feast of Chilaquiles, Huevos Rancheros, fresh pastries, organic coffee, and seasonal fruit. A daily celebration of Mexican mornings.

offerings.name: Rooftop Dining
offerings.description: Private dinners on the terrace with panoramic views of the Parroquia and the Sierra. Multi-course menus crafted by our kitchen or visiting private chefs.

offerings.name: Courtyard Dining
offerings.description: Al fresco lunches and intimate suppers beneath the jacaranda. Seasonal menus that honor the market's freshest ingredients.

offerings.name: Private Chef
offerings.description: A dedicated chef for your group — whether a romantic dinner for two or a multi-course feast for your full party. Menus customized to your preferences.

offerings.name: Mezcal & Wine
offerings.description: The Honor Bar — curated spirits, craft mezcal, and Mexican wines available on the honor system. Pour yourself something beautiful.

wellness.headline: Restoration Without Reservation
wellness.description: Professional therapists and instructors come to you — in your room, the courtyard, or the rooftop. No spa lobby. No scheduling pressure. Just restoration on your timeline.

tours.headline: Beyond Our Walls
tours.description: San Miguel de Allende is a living museum — and the highlands beyond it hold ancient secrets. Our concierge team connects you with the best guides and experiences the region has to offer.

offerings.name: Walking City Tour
offerings.description: Historic center, Parroquia, artisan workshops, and hidden courtyards with a local expert guide.

offerings.name: Art & Gallery Tour
offerings.description: Private gallery visits, artist studio meetings, and an insider's view of San Miguel's thriving art scene.

offerings.name: Culinary Tour
offerings.description: Market visit, hands-on cooking class, and mezcal tasting — a delicious journey through Mexican gastronomy.

offerings.name: Hot Springs (La Gruta)
offerings.description: Round-trip transport and entry to La Gruta's natural thermal pools, tucked into the highlands outside the city.

offerings.name: Cañada de la Virgen Ruins
offerings.description: Guided archaeological tour of the pre-Columbian pyramid complex, plus lunch at a local hacienda.

offerings.name: Wine Country (Dolores Hidalgo)
offerings.description: Vineyard visits, wine tastings, and a stop at Dolores Hidalgo's famous ceramic workshops.

retreats.headline: Your Private Sanctum
retreats.description: Transformative retreats for intimate groups. Yoga, circles, and journeys in the heart of San Miguel.
retreats.yogaDescription: Sunrise flows above the spires. Sunset rituals in the courtyard. Total restoration, nine rooms at a time.
retreats.spiritualDescription: Breathwork, ceremony, and stillness. Led by local masters in our private colonial sanctum.
retreats.womensDescription: Nine rooms. Zero noise. Absolute connection. Creative workshops and intimate circles behind colonial walls.

events.headline: Your Vision, Our Canvas
events.description: From intimate ceremonies under the jacaranda to corporate off-sites that inspire — Casa Schuck transforms for every occasion.
events.weddingsDescription: Elopements and intimate ceremonies in a setting that feels like a private hacienda. Rooftop receptions, candlelit courtyards, and every detail handled with grace.
events.corporateDescription: Strategy sessions meet colonial charm. Fast WiFi, breakout spaces, and team-building excursions — productivity wrapped in beauty.
events.buyoutDescription: Nine rooms, the entire property, exclusively yours. Ideal for milestone celebrations, family reunions, or multi-day experiences you design from scratch.

packages.headline: Seasonal Curations
packages.description: Local experiences, bundled for better value. Book direct for the best of the season.

blocks.title: Wellness & Retreats

blocks.title: Corporate & Groups
blocks.description: Strategy sessions meet colonial charm. Nine rooms, exclusively yours.

retreatsPage.headline: The Anchor of Your Inner Circle.
retreatsPage.introBody: Casa Schuck is uniquely engineered for high-impact gatherings. While our nine luxury suites offer an exclusive sanctuary for your core team, our deep local roots allow us to seamlessly anchor groups of up to 60. We provide the infrastructure, the "Access To" logistics, and the central colonial stage for your collective experience. Whether a wedding party or a creative summit, you have the space to convene and the privacy to connect.

pillars.title: YOGA
pillars.body: Rise with San Miguel. Practice in the open air with 360-degree views of the Parroquia. From sunrise vinyasa to starlit meditation, our rooftop becomes your private studio where the city meets the sky.
pillars.alt: Yoga practice on the rooftop terrace above San Miguel de Allende

pillars.title: WELLNESS
pillars.body: Modern healing behind 300-year-old walls. Engage in sacred ceremonies and sound baths led by the region's most respected practitioners. Behind thick cantera walls and the rhythm of the courtyard fountain, stillness is the ultimate luxury.
pillars.alt: Sacred ceremony space within colonial cantera walls

pillars.title: RETREATS
pillars.body: Nine rooms. Zero noise. Absolute connection. Casa Schuck is the premier destination for Women's Journeys, Men's Circles, and Creative Intensives. Our architecture is specifically designed for the movement between collective focus and personal reflection. Behind these colonial walls, you aren't just a guest; you are the host of your own world. Whether it is a writing retreat, a leadership summit, or a spiritual reset, a full-house buyout transforms the estate into your private laboratory for growth.
pillars.alt: Private retreat space at Casa Schuck for group intensives

retreatTypes.name: Yoga & Movement
retreatTypes.description: Deepen your practice in the heart of colonial Mexico. Twice-daily sessions on the rooftop at sunrise and in the courtyard at sunset, with optional excursions to the region's natural hot springs.
includes: 2x daily yoga practice (sunrise rooftop, sunset courtyard)
Optional hot springs excursion to La Gruta

retreatTypes.name: Sacred Journeys
retreatTypes.description: A deep immersion into the ancestral healing traditions of the Mexican highlands. Breathwork, cacao ceremony, temazcal, and sound healing — guided by local curanderos and practitioners rooted in generations of wisdom.

retreatTypes.name: Creative Intensives
retreatTypes.description: Writing, painting, or mixed-media — a structured creative retreat designed for breakthroughs. Morning sessions in the property's most inspiring spaces, afternoon excursions to artisan workshops and gallery tours, and evening salons for sharing work.
includes: Morning creative sessions with professional facilitator
Evening salons for sharing and feedback

groupsPage.headline: Your Vision, Our Canvas
groupsPage.subHeadline: From strategy sessions to milestone celebrations — Casa Schuck transforms for every occasion.

pillars.title: Corporate Retreats
pillars.body: Strategy sessions meet colonial charm. Fast WiFi, breakout spaces across the property, and team-building excursions through San Miguel — productivity wrapped in beauty. Your off-site has never looked this good.
pillars.alt: Corporate retreat setting at Casa Schuck

pillars.title: Whole-House Buyouts
pillars.body: Nine rooms, the entire property, exclusively yours. Ideal for milestone celebrations, family reunions, or multi-day experiences you design from scratch. Every corner becomes your canvas.
pillars.alt: Colonial courtyard set up for a private event

pillars.title: Milestone Celebrations
pillars.body: Birthdays, anniversaries, reunions — moments that deserve more than a restaurant reservation. The courtyard, the rooftop, the garden — each space transforms to match the occasion.

caseStudies.title: Tech Startup Offsite — 22 People, 4 Days
caseStudies.body: A Series B startup chose Casa Schuck for their annual leadership retreat. The courtyard served as the main session space, while breakout groups used the rooftop and library. Evening team dinners featured private chef experiences. Result: the team left with a 12-month roadmap and relationships strengthened by shared experience.

caseStudies.title: Family Reunion — 35 Guests, 5 Days
caseStudies.body: Three generations of a Mexican-American family returned to San Miguel for a milestone birthday. Casa Schuck coordinated a welcome dinner on the rooftop, a cooking class, a private tour of the Parroquia, and a final-night fiesta with mariachi. The family has already rebooked for next year.

heroSplit.headline: History, Curated for the Modern Soul.
heroSplit.body: In the heart of San Miguel, we've woven centuries of colonial heritage into a sanctuary of contemporary stillness.
heroSplit.heroAlt: Sun-drenched colonial courtyard with lush plants and stone arches

narrative.headline: A House of Quiet Devotion.
narrative.body: Casa Schuck is not merely a hotel; it is an architectural poem. Every stone speaks of centuries past, while every amenity whispers of contemporary luxury. We invite you to lose yourself in the textures of our walls and find yourself in the stillness of our gardens.
narrative.imageAlt: Intricate blue and white hand-painted Mexican ceramic tiles

pillars.title: Authenticity
pillars.body: Preserving the raw soul of colonial craftsmanship while integrating the seamless ease of modern life.

pillars.title: Intimacy
pillars.body: With only nine suites, your stay is defined by personal attention and a profound sense of privacy.

pillars.title: Sanctuary
pillars.body: Lush gardens and shaded courtyards designed for reflection, far from the echoes of the outside world.

signatureSuite.name: El Royal Suite.
signatureSuite.body: Vaulted timber ceilings and hand-carved stone fireplaces frame views of the cathedral spires. This is the zenith of colonial elegance.

Morning meditation in courtyard, late checkout, departure
